name: Snatch Ransomware Activity Detected
notes:
This is rule detects Snatch ransomware activity.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Snatch Ransomware
SIGMA Description: Detects specific process characteristics of Snatch ransomware word document droppers


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%shutdown /r /f /t 00%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%net stop superbackupman%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Snatch Ransomware Activity Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%shutdown /r /f /t 00%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%net stop superbackupman%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Snatch Ransomware Activity Detected
Event description: Detects Snatch ransomware activity.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
